final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese annotated infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 / 文博专题信息图 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours; must feel scholarly, restrained, collectible, not poster-like or commercial
Composition: must follow this fixed layout:
  顶部: 中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
  左侧: 结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，配局部特写
  右上: 材质 / 工艺 / 质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
  右中: 纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
  底部: 穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
  中央主体: 真实人物全身站姿（若主题适合人物展示）或中心主体拆解图
Subject: must include a carefully chosen 中国少数民族服饰 subject — model should auto-select the most representative and visually rich ethnic costume system, including all key structural components, garment layers, headwear, accessories, and ornaments
Scene/backdrop: must use a paper-textured background in 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 tones, evoking archival museum display boards
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, even, archival-documentation atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a palette derived from the chosen ethnic costume's authentic colors, set against the muted paper background — exact tonal balance is yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic depictions of fabric textures, embroidery surfaces, weave patterns, and material sample swatches with 中文 labels; exact rendering technique is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all in-image text in 简体中文 — including 主标题, 副标题, 导语, 引线标注, 材质说明, 纹样寓意, 色彩含义, 穿着顺序, 核心特征总结; all characters must be legible, correctly written, no romanization, no pinyin, no English, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve accurate garment structure and cultural accuracy for the chosen ethnic group; all annotations must be structurally correct and match the depicted components; text must be crisp and readable at full resolution; layout must follow the five-zone structure above
Avoid: 海报感, 影楼感, 电商感, 动漫感, cosplay感, 乱标注, 错结构, 糊字, 假材质, 过度装饰, English text, pinyin, garbled characters
